AUTH.TITLE: Clinic Portal Sign in
AUTH.SUBTITLE: Powered by Biomet VetAI
AUTH.RESET_SENT: Check your inbox — we sent you a password reset link.
AUTH.RESET_BODY: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
AUTH.ERROR_GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
AUTH.SET_PASSWORD_BODY: Enter your new password to complete the reset.

HOME.SUBTITLE: Here's your clinic at a glance.

WELCOME.TITLE: Welcome to {{name}} Copilot
WELCOME.SUBTITLE: Powered by Biomet VetAI
WELCOME.BODY:
Let's set up your clinic so you can start using Copilot.
This will only take a few minutes.
WELCOME.TERMS_PRE: By clicking continue, you agree to our
WELCOME.INVALID_BODY: This onboarding link is not valid. Please request a new link from Biomet.
WELCOME.EXPIRED_BODY: This onboarding link has expired. Please contact Biomet to request a new one.
WELCOME.USED_BODY: This onboarding link has already been used. If you believe this is an error, please contact Biomet.
WELCOME.NOT_FOUND_BODY: We could not find this onboarding link. Please check the link and try again.
WELCOME.NO_TOKEN_BODY: Please use the onboarding link provided by Biomet to set up your clinic account.

CLINIC_SETUP.TITLE: Setup your clinic account
CLINIC_SETUP.SUBTITLE: You are setting up the shared details for your clinic. Your team will use this information.
CLINIC_SETUP.LOGO_HINT: PNG, JPEG or WebP — max 2 MB. Optional.
CLINIC_SETUP.LOGO_TYPE_ERROR: Invalid file type. Please upload a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
CLINIC_SETUP.LOGO_SIZE_ERROR: File too large. Maximum size is 2 MB.
CLINIC_SETUP.EMAIL_READONLY_HINT: This email was provided by Biomet and cannot be changed.

ADMIN_PROFILE.TITLE: Setup your profile
ADMIN_PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Create your account to access the application.
ADMIN_PROFILE.EMAIL_READONLY_HINT: This email was provided by Biomet and cannot be changed.
ADMIN_PROFILE.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters.
ADMIN_PROFILE.INVITE_TEXT: Invite your staff to join {{name}} Copilot. They'll inherit your clinic settings and only need to complete their personal details. A magic link will be sent to your clinic email for sharing.
ADMIN_PROFILE.SUCCESS_BODY: Your account has been created successfully. You can now sign in with your email and password.
ADMIN_PROFILE.LOGO_UPLOAD_FAILED: Account created successfully, but logo upload failed. You can upload your logo later from Settings.

STAFF_PROFILE.TITLE: Create your account
STAFF_PROFILE.INVITED: You've been invited to join {{name}}. Complete your details to get started.
STAFF_PROFILE.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters.
STAFF_PROFILE.EXISTING_USER_BODY: Your account already exists. Tap below to join {{name}}.
STAFF_PROFILE.LINK_EXPIRED_BODY: This invite link has expired. Ask your clinic admin to generate a new one.

PWA.INSTALL_BODY: Install the app for quick access from your phone.

STAFF.INVITE_BODY: Invite your staff to join {{name}} Copilot. They will inherit your clinic settings and only need to complete their personal details.
STAFF.MODAL_BODY: Share this link with your staff. It expires in 7 days.
STAFF.LAST_ADMIN_ERROR: Cannot remove or demote the last admin. Promote another staff member to admin first.
STAFF.EMPTY: No staff members yet. Invite your first team member above.
STAFF.MODAL_EXISTING_BODY: A pending invite already exists for this email. Share the existing link or resend the invitation.
STAFF.ERROR_CAPACITY: You've reached the maximum of 10 pending invites. Wait for one to be accepted or expire before creating a new one.
STAFF.ERROR_MEMBER: This user is already a member of the clinic.
STAFF.EXISTING_TOGGLE: This person already has a VetAI account →
STAFF.EXISTING_TITLE: Invite someone with an existing account
STAFF.EXISTING_BODY: Use this if the person already has a VetAI account — from this clinic or another. They'll join without creating a new account.
STAFF.EXISTING_MODAL_BODY: Share this link with the staff member. They'll be able to join the clinic without creating a new account.
